raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.4": 3, "R1.6": 4, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identified and addressed internal contradictions in the text, which is a form of logical consistency.",
    "R1.4": "The agent provided specific feedback on issues that need author attention, mapping against prior work and identifying deltas.",
    "R1.6": "The agent's revisions improved the prose significantly, making the text more readable and coherent.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged several areas of uncertainty in the recommendations, such as the priority claim and multiplier range.",
    "RX.3": "The agent provided a detailed summary of changes made and issues that need author attention, covering multiple aspects of the manuscript.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's revisions did not introduce new errors or harmful content, but it did not address all potential downstream harms, such as unverified claims.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided a detailed summary of changes made and issues that need author attention, but did not trace every non-cosmetic change."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identified and addressed internal contradictions in the text, which is a form of logical consistency.
rationale.R1.4: The agent provided specific feedback on issues that need author attention, mapping against prior work and identifying deltas.
rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions improved the prose significantly, making the text more readable and coherent.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged several areas of uncertainty in the recommendations, such as the priority claim and multiplier range.
rationale.RX.3: The agent provided a detailed summary of changes made and issues that need author attention, covering multiple aspects of the manuscript.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's revisions did not introduce new errors or harmful content, but it did not address all potential downstream harms, such as unverified claims.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided a detailed summary of changes made and issues that need author attention, but did not trace every non-cosmetic change.
